transcription.text: you ladies sure get a break with today's fine cosmetics they stay on better last longer but of course they're much harder to remove and that's why you need deep magic the one facial cleanser that's made to remove modern cosmetic deep magic by Tony gently dissolves dirt and makeup cleans deep down where soaps and creams can't reach so wear makeup but remove it with deep magic the facial cleanser made to remove modern cosmetics now during this once a year special you can get two 60 cent bottles that's a dollar twenty value for only 89 cents deep magic
